parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 legacy-advice-isolation parity — history sessions carry legacy final-advice residue (exercise.suggestion/warning/adjustment + session.explanations). buildCleanAppDataView strips them (cleanInput.diagnostics.legacyAdviceSessionIds non-empty) so the live decision comes only from the v2 engine, never from stale stored advice.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData. Two recent sessions seeded with legacyAdvice=true (the synthetic builder injects suggestion/warning/adjustment on each exercise + a session.explanations entry). The golden proves stripLegacyAdviceFromSession removed them before the decision.
